query: SELECT id, title, slug, isTemplate, parentFormId, status, createdByStaffId FROM forms WHERE title LIKE '%ONE%' OR title LIKE '%One%' OR title LIKE '%innovation%' OR title LIKE '%Innovation%' OR isTemplate = 1 LIMIT 20;
